copyText:
Install:
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/saas-pricing-experimentation-engine.zip -o saas-pricing-experimentation-engine.zip && unzip -o saas-pricing-experimentation-engine.zip -d ./saas-pricing-experimentation-engine

Usage:
Use this skill to structure pricing tests that improve revenue signals while protecting retention and trust.

Asset:
# Trigger
"Apply the SaaS pricing experimentation engine skill to this offer model."

# Required output
1) Test hypotheses and success metrics
2) Segment and cohort strategy
3) Guardrails and stop-loss criteria
4) Rollout decision framework
detailMarkdown:
# SaaS Pricing Experimentation Engine Skill

Run low-risk SaaS pricing experiments with clear hypotheses, segment-aware metrics, and decision-safe rollout controls.

## Trust

- Package: maintainer-built/verified package
- Review: unclaimed

## Install
```bash
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/saas-pricing-experimentation-engine.zip -o saas-pricing-experimentation-engine.zip && unzip -o saas-pricing-experimentation-engine.zip -d ./saas-pricing-experimentation-engine
```

## Usage
Use this skill to structure pricing tests that improve revenue signals while protecting retention and trust.
